claim: Ly49Q directs the organization of neutrophil polarization by regulating membrane raft functions.
evidence_sentences: Ly49Q-dependent polarization and migration were affected by Ly49Q regulation of membrane raft functions.

We propose that Ly49Q is pivotal in switching neutrophils to their polarized morphology and rapid migration upon inflammation, through its spatiotemporal regulation of membrane rafts and raft-associated signaling molecules.
